Per-Strategy Accuracy Tracking Pipeline — Compute and store accuracy % per strategy version from backtest results. Track win rate, Sharpe, and profit factor per version. Detect regressions automatically.
Complete market data provider cost-benefit analysis by Wednesday

Sector F&G Backtest Harness — Backtest global-only vs sector-only vs blended (Option C) F&G strategies across all asset classes. Sweep weight ratios to find optimal blend. Compare accuracy, Sharpe, win rate, and excess returns.

Hub UI for Sector F&G — Update F&G strategy modal to show global F&G, sector F&G, blended (effective) F&G, weight applied, and divergence indicator per ticker. Add sector F&G overview section to the modal header.
Fix hub build failure and commit outstanding change
